rationale: v14 is the already-authorized v13 plus exactly the AM-41 insertion at Task 4a’s shared D33 grammar clause. That insertion correctly freezes the supported module-lexical profile, the exact enumerable out-of-profile set b1–b6, the stable diagnostic unsupported-module-lexical-profile, deterministic fail-closed rejection (no edge/closure/coverage claim), original-uncollapsed-component lstat-before-..-collapse containment on the shared resolver plus a fixture, and the two required proof properties—while explicitly remaining a closed-subset total-correctness bar, not a full ES lexer/parser and not an override of the codex seat. All other frozen decisions (AM-40 PACKAGE_ROOTS, advisory/non-sandbox posture per AM-35–39, D17/AM-17, D24/D26/D31, D32, D33 accepted-form set, zero-dependency, spine read-only, fail-closed closed sets, D34 publication-time re-derivation, D35 coverage schema, producer attribution) are reaffirmed unchanged. The plan is implementation-ready on its own advisory terms, matches governing spec v2.8 and the repository trust model, and its exit criteria and task sequencing are consistent with those decisions. No hard stop or concrete edit is required for AS-IS Argo execution.
